name: The Fall in the Garden
oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Each player mills two cards.
II — Target opponent sacrifices a creature or enchantment.
III — Return up to one permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
flavorText: "And when the woman saw that the tree was good for food... she took of the fruit thereof, and did eat." — Genesis 3:6
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme uses Lucas Cranach's "The Fall of Man" via Wikimedia Commons.
